title: Occult Scores & Commissions
description: Jobs, heists, and contracts that come through occult channels — for a crew operating at the intersection of criminal enterprise and supernatural hazard.

entries.result: Steal a specific page from a sealed archive at a private estate. The archive is warded. The page is between two others that must not be disturbed.
Intercept a courier who is carrying a sealed parcel through the city tonight. The parcel must arrive at the destination not knowing it has been opened.
Break a binding that is keeping something contained in the basement of a demolished building. The client doesn't want the thing released — they want the binding moved to a new vessel.
Recover a mirror from an estate before the estate is liquidated. The mirror shows things the client wants kept private.
Deliver a package to an address that keeps changing. The address will be correct when you reach it.
Attend an invitation-only gathering under a false identity and identify the person carrying a specific sealed item. Do not take it. Just identify them.
Find and destroy all copies of a ritual that has been reproduced and distributed without the author's knowledge. The author is dead. The problem isn't.
Retrieve a client's name from the ledger of a death-broker who has been selling debt to something the client would rather not owe.
Remove an object from a sealed room in a city building without triggering the alarm, the ward, or the thing that has been living in the corner for three years.
Locate a witness who has hidden themselves using a concealment method that makes them impossible to find by conventional means.
Replace a real item in a collection with a perfect copy before the collection's owner returns from a fortnight abroad.
Convince a spirit currently inhabiting a building to relocate voluntarily before the building's new owners move in and do something worse.
Deliver a message that cannot be written down or spoken aloud. The recipient will know how to receive it.
Break a contract that was signed by someone now deceased on behalf of someone now alive and unaware.
Extract a person from a cult before the next ceremony, without the cult knowing the extraction was deliberate.
Acquire a specific material that is only produced in one place and that place is controlled by a faction that wants it controlled.
Discredit an investigator who is getting close to something the client would rather stayed buried.
Attend a séance being conducted by a rival and ensure the contact does not go through.
Find a lost item for a client who cannot describe what they're looking for because every time they try, they forget it.
Ensure that a specific auction lot goes to a specific buyer, without being observed doing so, and without outbidding the competition directly.
Remove a set of remains from a location before someone else finds them. The remains are not human.
Acquire the contact information for a person who conducts business only through dead drops and proxies.
Prevent a sale that is scheduled for three days from now. The sale is legal. The object being sold is not what it appears to be.
Follow a target for seventy-two hours and produce a record of everyone they meet. Do not be seen.
Plant evidence of a crime in a location where it will be found by the right people at the right time.
Remove evidence of a crime from a location before an investigation reaches it.
Identify who has been feeding information to a third party and stop the flow without confronting anyone directly.
Rescue something from a building that is due to be demolished in forty-eight hours.
Ensure a meeting goes badly without either party knowing it was engineered.
Get into a private library that has been sealed by legal injunction and photograph or copy specific documents.
Acquire a person's signature on a document without them reading it fully.
Ensure that a specific name does not appear in the official record of an event that is being transcribed tonight.
Locate a shipment that was diverted from its intended destination and is currently somewhere in the city's warehouse district.
Determine whether a collector's acquisition is genuine or a plant designed to compromise them.
Ensure a specific person does not make it to a meeting without harming them.
Break into a grieving family's home, replace a specific object, and leave no trace — including no trace of the original object.
Establish a false trail in three different record systems before morning.
Retrieve a set of letters before they are read by the person they were sent to.
Locate and acquire a formula that has been distributed in pieces to different couriers who don't know they're carrying parts of the same thing.
Ensure that a specific door remains unlocked for one hour during the middle of the night.
Recover a debt from an entity that does not deal in money.
Perform a specific ritual at a specific location at a specific time for a client who cannot be present.
Create a distraction large enough and strange enough to clear a two-block radius for twenty minutes.
Get close enough to a specific person to confirm their identity without alerting them that they've been identified.
Acquire something that technically isn't owned by anyone because the owner has been declared legally nonexistent.
Escort a package containing something alive across the city without drawing attention to the fact that it is alive.
Find and disrupt a supply chain that has been feeding something in the old district what it needs to survive.
Locate a practitioner who has gone underground after a job went wrong. The client wants to know why it went wrong, not the practitioner.
Ensure that a confession signed under duress is found before it can be used, and ensure the person who signed it knows it's been found.
Determine the exact nature of an agreement made at a specific location at a specific historical date — and whether any parties to it are still bound by it.
Infiltrate a research society and determine whether the work they've been doing has attracted attention from something that precedes the society by centuries.
Locate a specific grave and confirm that the occupant is still there.
Confirm or deny whether a business operating legally is a front for something operating through different channels entirely.
Acquire property that someone has been trying to give away and that nobody will accept.
Track an object that is moving through the city's secondary market, passing through three or more hands per day, without making contact with it.
Provide cover for someone conducting an extraction from a building that cannot be visibly breached.
Ensure that a specific object is in a specific location at a specific time and ensure that you are not in that location when it arrives.
Reverse an action taken by a previous crew who did the job wrong.
Steal something that cannot be carried because it has no physical form, only presence.
Complete a ritual started by someone who didn't survive to finish it, using only the notes they left behind.
